role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and assigned 'neutral' confidence.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (Pinus thunbergii, Buxus) and landscaping styles.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure, drainage gutters, and utility poles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural features (kawara tiles, wooden siding) and cross-domain cues.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Japan as the location. The linguistic agent appropriately noted the lack of text, while the other four agents provided strong, corroborating evidence based on architecture, botany, and infrastructure.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of stone walls, hedges, and road width match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of the pruned pine and boxwood hedges match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the concrete drainage gutter and utility poles match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the roof tiles and wooden siding match the image.
